top_signals.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q3 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes.

top_signals.title: Who Runs the Ransomware Group ‘The Gentlemen?’
top_signals.summary: A cybercrime group known as The Gentlemen has emerged as the second most active ransomware gang by victim count, rapidly attracting a talented pool of hackers through an aggressive recruitment strategy that promises affiliates 90 percent of any ransom paid by victims. This post examines clues pointing to a real life identity for the administrator of The Gentlemen ransomware group.

top_signals.title: Venezuela Hit by Massive Earthquakes
top_signals.summary: Venezuela declared a state of emergency after massive back-to-back earthquakes toppled buildings in Caracas, knocked down power lines and devastated the capital’s main airport. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Cal-Maine, Others Poised to Settle DOJ Egg Pricing Probe
top_signals.summary: Cal-Maine Foods Inc. and other egg suppliers are close to resolving an investigation by the US Justice Department and a bipartisan group of states into alleged illegal price coordination, according to people familiar with the matter.

alerts.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

alerts.title: China's nuclear power capacity nearly doubled since 2016
alerts.summary: From 2016 to 2024, China's nuclear generation capacity increased 76% (24 GW), based on our International Energy Statistics (IES) data. According to the International Atomic Energy Agency's Power Reactor Information System (PRIS), China added an additional 1.1 GW of nuclear power capacity in 2025 and 2.2 GW in 2026 (through May). China is continuing to build out its nuclear generating capacity and has 36 reactors under construction, accounting for more than 49% of total world nuclear construction, according to PRIS.
alerts.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
